---
title: "Resources"
subtitle: "Tools, tutorials, datasets, and learning materials"
page-layout: article
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
---

::: {.page-header}
# Resources
Tools and knowledge for the geospatial community
:::

## Overview

We are committed to open science and reproducible research. Below you'll find curated resources including our open-source tools, Python/R code, GEE scripts, QGIS models, field survey protocols, and recommended learning materials.

---

## Open-Source Tools & Code

::: {.grid-3}

::: {.resource-card}
::: {.resource-icon}
<i class="fab fa-python"></i>
:::
### LULC-DL Toolkit
Python library for deep learning-based land cover classification from satellite imagery, with built-in accuracy assessment and field validation utilities.

- <i class="fab fa-github"></i> [GitHub Repository](#)
- <i class="fas fa-book"></i> [Documentation](#)
- <i class="fas fa-download"></i> `pip install lulc-dl`
:::

::: {.resource-card}
::: {.resource-icon}
<i class="fas fa-cloud"></i>
:::
### GEE Workflow Library
Collection of Google Earth Engine JavaScript and Python scripts for change detection, composite generation, spectral indices, and time-series analysis.

- <i class="fab fa-github"></i> [GitHub Repository](#)
- <i class="fas fa-book"></i> [Script Catalog](#)
- <i class="fas fa-globe"></i> [GEE Code Editor](#)
:::

::: {.resource-card}
::: {.resource-icon}
<i class="fas fa-chart-bar"></i>
:::
### R-Spatial Analysis Pack
R package with functions for spatial prediction, geostatistical analysis, accuracy assessment, and automated report generation for geographic research.

- <i class="fab fa-github"></i> [GitHub Repository](#)
- <i class="fas fa-book"></i> [Documentation](#)
- <i class="fas fa-download"></i> `devtools::install_github()`
:::

:::

---

## Field Survey Resources

::: {.grid-2}

::: {.resource-card}
::: {.resource-icon}
<i class="fas fa-clipboard-list"></i>
:::
### Ground-Truth Collection Protocol
Our standardized field survey methodology for collecting GPS-referenced training and validation samples for remote sensing accuracy assessment.

- Stratified random sampling design templates
- GPS field data collection forms
- Photo documentation guidelines
- Accuracy assessment spreadsheet templates (OA, Kappa, F1)
- [<i class="fas fa-download"></i> Download Protocol PDF](#)
:::

::: {.resource-card}
::: {.resource-icon}
<i class="fas fa-map-marked-alt"></i>
:::
### QGIS Model Library
Collection of QGIS Processing models for terrain analysis, suitability mapping, MCDA, and cartographic layouts.

- DEM derivative computation (slope, aspect, TWI, TPI, TRI)
- Multi-Criteria Decision Analysis (AHP/TOPSIS) models
- Network accessibility analysis models
- Map layout templates for academic publications
- [<i class="fas fa-download"></i> Download Models](#)
:::

:::

---

## Public Datasets

| Dataset | Format | Tools Used | Description |
|:--------|:-------|:-----------|:------------|
| LULC Training Dataset v2.0 | GeoTIFF, CSV | GEE, Python | 5,000+ labeled satellite image chips for 8-class LULC classification with field-collected labels |
| Change Detection Reference | GeoPackage | GEE, QGIS | Multi-temporal change/no-change reference dataset with field-validated labels for 200+ locations |
| Climate Vulnerability Index | GeoPackage | R, QGIS | Multi-criteria vulnerability indices calibrated with ground-station data for 3 metro areas |
| Ground-Truth Survey Points | GPS/CSV | GPS, QGIS | 1,200+ GPS-referenced field observations with land cover, land use, and crop type labels |
| GEE Script Archive | JavaScript | GEE | 25+ reusable GEE scripts for composite generation, index computation, and classification |

::: {.info-box}
#### <i class="fas fa-download"></i> Data Access
All datasets are available on our [GitHub organization](https://github.com/spatialgeography). Registration may be required for large datasets.
:::

---

## Tutorials & Learning Materials

### Getting Started Guides

::: {.grid-2}

::: {.resource-card}
::: {.resource-icon}
<i class="fab fa-python"></i>
:::
### Python for Geospatial Analysis
Comprehensive tutorial series: GeoPandas, Rasterio, scikit-learn for spatial ML, TensorFlow/PyTorch for DL, and geospatial visualization with Folium/matplotlib.

- <i class="fas fa-play-circle"></i> [Video Series (12 parts)](#)
- <i class="fab fa-github"></i> [Jupyter Notebooks](#)
:::

::: {.resource-card}
::: {.resource-icon}
<i class="fas fa-globe"></i>
:::
### Google Earth Engine Masterclass
Step-by-step guide from basic GEE operations to complex workflows: composites, indices, change detection, Random Forest classification, and time-series analysis.

- <i class="fas fa-play-circle"></i> [Video Series (8 parts)](#)
- <i class="fab fa-github"></i> [GEE Code Scripts](#)
:::

::: {.resource-card}
::: {.resource-icon}
<i class="fas fa-layer-group"></i>
:::
### QGIS for Geographic Research
Advanced QGIS tutorials: spatial analysis, terrain modeling, MCDA, cartographic design, PyQGIS scripting, and Processing model development.

- <i class="fas fa-play-circle"></i> [Video Series (10 parts)](#)
- <i class="fas fa-file-pdf"></i> [PDF Manual](#)
:::

::: {.resource-card}
::: {.resource-icon}
<i class="fas fa-robot"></i>
:::
### Deep Learning for Remote Sensing
From CNN basics to advanced architectures: image classification, semantic segmentation, object detection, and transfer learning with satellite imagery in Python.

- <i class="fas fa-play-circle"></i> [Video Series (15 parts)](#)
- <i class="fab fa-github"></i> [Code Repository](#)
:::

:::

---

## Recommended Software Stack

### GIS & Mapping
- **[QGIS](https://qgis.org)** — Primary open-source GIS for visualization, analysis, and cartographic production
- **[GRASS GIS](https://grass.osgeo.org)** — Advanced raster and vector processing, terrain analysis
- **[Google Earth Engine](https://earthengine.google.com)** — Cloud platform for planetary-scale analysis

### Programming Languages
- **[Python](https://www.python.org)** — GeoPandas, Rasterio, scikit-learn, TensorFlow, PyTorch, xarray
- **[R](https://www.r-project.org)** — sf, terra, stars, tmap, caret, randomForest, rgee, tidyverse
- **[JavaScript](https://developer.mozilla.org)** — GEE Code Editor, Leaflet, D3.js for web mapping

### Remote Sensing
- **[SNAP/ESA](https://step.esa.int/main/toolboxes/snap/)** — Sentinel-1 SAR and Sentinel-2 optical processing
- **[ERDAS IMAGINE](https://www.hexagongeospatial.com)** — Advanced image classification and photogrammetry

### Field Survey
- **GPS Essentials / SW Maps** — Android GPS data collection apps
- **KoBoToolbox** — Open-source field data collection platform
- **ODK (Open Data Kit)** — Mobile data collection for ground-truth surveys

---

## Useful External Resources

### Data Sources
- **[USGS Earth Explorer](https://earthexplorer.usgs.gov)** — Landsat, Sentinel, and other satellite data
- **[Copernicus Open Access Hub](https://scihub.copernicus.eu)** — Free Sentinel-1, -2, -3 data
- **[NASA Earthdata](https://earthdata.nasa.gov)** — NASA earth science data archive
- **[OpenStreetMap](https://www.openstreetmap.org)** — Open collaborative mapping data
- **[Natural Earth](https://www.naturalearthdata.com)** — Free vector and raster map data

### Learning Platforms
- **[Geocomputation with R](https://r.geocompx.org)** — Open textbook for spatial data science in R
- **[Automating GIS Processes](https://autogis-site.readthedocs.io)** — University of Helsinki Python GIS course
- **[EO-College](https://eo-college.org)** — Free courses on Earth observation
- **[GEE Developers Guide](https://developers.google.com/earth-engine)** — Official GEE documentation

---

::: {.info-box}
#### <i class="fas fa-lightbulb"></i> Suggest a Resource
Know of a great resource we should include? [Let us know](contact.qmd) and we'll add it to this page!
:::
